verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the USA. The agents provided high-quality, domain-specific evidence (e.g., specific pine species, road line colors, camera artifacts). The tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish the USA from the closest analog (Canada).
